pages.text:
MOSHE SHAREIT

Minister for Foreign Affairs ro all to whom these Presents shall come be it known:

the Establishment of

in Artiole XX that States may becomo partios to the Convention by acceptanco;

AND WHEREAS the Covernmant of Tangel fs desiroug oP becoming party to the Convention for the Establishment of the european Plant protection vrganization and 1s willing to accept the obligations of the Convention;

NOW THEREFORE, by these Presents, it is declared that the Government of Israel, in accordance with Article XX of the said Convention.

accepts the Convention for the Establishment of the European Plant Protection Organization.

IN WIINESS WHEREOF, I have hereunto caused the Seal of the Ministry for Foreign Affaira to be affixed, and have subscribed my signature at Jerusalem this Iwenty-l'hird day of

Av in the year Five Thousand Seven Hundred and Thirteen which corresponds to the Fourth day of august in the year One

Thousand Nine Hundred and Fifty Three.

In. Sharett
